title: Beni Mellal, Béni Mellal-Khénifra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Beni Mellal is a city in Béni Mellal-Khénifra with a population of 192,000. A city at the foot of the Atlas Mountains, known for its olive groves, waterfalls, and agricultural production.
